title: Scheduled Water Supply Shutdown
body: Dear Residents, the water supply will be shut down on 25th June 2026 from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM for annual maintenance of the overhead tank. Please store sufficient water in advance. We apologise for the inconvenience.

title: Annual General Meeting — July 2026
body: All residents are invited to the Annual General Meeting scheduled on 5th July 2026 at 6:00 PM in the Clubhouse. Agenda: Review of accounts, election of new committee members, and discussion of upcoming society projects. Your presence is important.

title: Maintenance Charges Due — June 2026
body: This is a reminder that June 2026 maintenance charges are due by 30th June 2026. Please make your payment online through the NivassHub app or deposit a cheque in the society office. A penalty of ₹200/month will be charged for late payments.

title: Gym Timings Updated
body: The society gym timings have been updated as follows: Weekdays 6:00 AM – 9:00 AM & 5:00 PM – 9:00 PM; Weekends 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM. Members are requested to carry their access cards. Children below 16 are not allowed without adult supervision.

title: Pest Control Drive — 26th June
body: A comprehensive pest control treatment will be carried out on 26th June 2026 for all common areas including parking, gym, corridors, and the clubhouse. Residents who wish to opt for their individual flats may register at the office by 24th June. Cost: ₹500 per flat.

title: Welcome — New Resident Deepa Venkatesh
body: Please join us in welcoming our new resident, Mrs. Deepa Venkatesh, who has moved into Flat A-304 this month. We wish her and her family a happy stay in NivassHub Residency.

title: Fire Safety Drill — 28th June
body: As part of our commitment to resident safety, a mandatory fire safety drill is scheduled for 28th June 2026 at 10:00 AM. All residents are required to participate. Fire safety officers will be on-site to guide evacuations. Meeting point: Society Park.

title: No Parking in Fire Lane
body: It has been observed that some residents are parking vehicles in the fire lane near Block C. This is a safety hazard and violates fire safety norms. Vehicles found parked in the fire lane will be towed at the owner's expense without prior notice.

title: Children's Day Celebration
body: NivassHub Residents' Welfare Association is organising a Children's Day celebration on 29th June 2026 at 4:00 PM in the society park. Fun games, prizes, and snacks for children. All resident children below 15 years are invited. Parents please register your children at the office.

title: Internet Service Upgrade
body: The society broadband provider will be upgrading the network infrastructure on 24th June 2026 between 2:00 AM and 5:00 AM. During this window, internet services may be intermittently unavailable. The upgrade will bring speeds from 100 Mbps to 300 Mbps.
